01 — About

I'm a Data Analytics postgraduate student at Digital University of Kerala, with a rich academic background in Physics (Material Science). I carry a rare combination of scientific rigour, creative intuition, and a love for turning raw data into stories that matter.

Outside the terminal, I'm a self-taught freelance designer — crafting brand identities, advertising posters, and visual narratives. I believe in the intersection of logic and aesthetics, and I bring that philosophy to everything I do.

I've tutored undergraduate students in Physics and Mathematics, led independent research projects, and contributed to AI-powered GIS platforms. Whether it's a dataset, a design brief, or a research question — I thrive when the problem is hard.

04 — Research

Spectral Classification of stars based on the MK system using data from SDSS.org — calculated surface temperatures of ~20 stars via Wien's Displacement Law by analyzing their spectra. (BSc Final Year · Dr. Joe Jacob)

Green Synthesis of Silver Nanoparticles using Moringa Leaves for potential supercapacitor applications.

Predicting the unseen state space of multiple attractor continuous systems using Reservoir Computing.

Automated identification of Magnetosphere region using an unsupervised ML model.

AI-powered centralized GIS platform to visualize, analyse, and manage implementing agencies under the PM-AJAY scheme.
